# Pull Request

## Summary

[What does this PR do? Why?]

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bilingual quality improvement
- [ ] Validation / scripts
- [ ] Installer fix
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `scripts/validate-agent-files.sh` passes
- [ ] `scripts/validate-skill.sh` passes
- [ ] `scripts/validate-bilingual.sh` passes
- [ ] No generated zip files committed
- [ ] No `dist/` assets committed (except `dist/.gitkeep`)
- [ ] No private/internal company data included
- [ ] No Digikala references
- [ ] No secrets or token-like examples
- [ ] If bilingual: FA/EN parity maintained
- [ ] If new pack: VERSION file included
- [ ] If new skill content: matched in both chatgpt-skill and codex-skill
